penalties.description: Maximum time reached without completing the task.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The task exceeded the maximum time limit of 300 seconds without completion, resulting in an automatic zero score. The video was sufficiently clear to assess timing accurately.
